name: UBA : Anonymous User Accessed a Resource
notes: Detects an anonymous user that is accessing a resource.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250976) AnonymousLinkUsed
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Anonymous User Accessed a Resource on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event QID is one of the following (101250976) AnonymousLinkUsed
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Anonymous User Accessed a Resource
